title: Layer 4: AI & Tech Competition
desc: Technology as the long-term structural variable
desc_zh: 技术作为长期结构性变量

gpuBlackMarket.threshold: Premium falling = sanctions leaking; Premium rising = bottleneck tightening
gpuBlackMarket.threshold_zh: 溢价下降=制裁在漏；溢价上升=瓶颈收紧
gpuBlackMarket.note: H100/B200 grey market premium. Monitor restrictions vs smuggling flows.
gpuBlackMarket.note_zh: H100/B200灰市溢价。关注禁令与走私流量的博弈。

chinaAiAdoption.threshold: Monitor: DeepSeek API calls, 通义 enterprise cases, 文心 industry adoption
chinaAiAdoption.threshold_zh: 关注：DeepSeek API调用量、通义企业案例、文心行业落地
chinaAiAdoption.note: DeepSeek R1 proved export controls don't stop AI progress, only change path.
chinaAiAdoption.note_zh: DeepSeek R1证明了出口管制不能阻止AI进步，只是改变了路径。

nvdaAsiaRevenue.threshold: Asia share rising = chips still flowing despite restrictions
nvdaAsiaRevenue.threshold_zh: 亚洲占比上升=芯片仍在流通
nvdaAsiaRevenue.note: Quarterly earnings. Check 'China' and 'Singapore' revenue breakdowns.
nvdaAsiaRevenue.note_zh: 季度财报。关注'中国'和'新加坡'的收入拆分。

chinaEnergyIntensity.threshold: Sustained -3%+ = AI + manufacturing efficiency offsetting energy costs
chinaEnergyIntensity.threshold_zh: 持续-3%以上=AI+制造效率在抵扣能源成本
chinaEnergyIntensity.note: Key competitiveness metric: China efficiency gains vs rivals' pure fuel cost exposure
chinaEnergyIntensity.note_zh: 关键竞争力指标：中国效率提升vs竞争对手的纯燃料成本暴露
